segments.text: Major course correction incoming. Ditch OCI for slice 1. Full local build using docker compose. We containerize postgres, enrichment, and query, maybe ollama too. The system should go live with a simple make up command.
We remove artifact blob storage from the database in phase 1 and shift to local storage on a docker volume through a data layer abstraction. We will also have config for an S3 bucket soon.
We will bring a local MCP into slice 1 so desktop Claude and GPT can connect. The project should be machine first.
Oracle should be just a provider like Postgres, not the shape of the app. We should use factories that read config and return the right stores.
We should keep synchronous Rust throughout unless a thin async edge is forced on us by some transport library.

I think the queue can live in database records basically forever rather than adding a real MQ. Edited files should create new artifacts later instead of mutating old ones so we preserve lineage and supersession.
